overview.hero_subtitle: Lagged OLS regression on 9 stocks against ~30 macro & market predictors. Daily ingestion · weekly refit · four-test diagnostic battery before any model goes live.
overview.section_portfolio_desc: The active model fleet, rolled up across the 5 risk profiles.
overview.empty_weights_desc: Run the daily prediction pipeline once models are fit — weights get rebuilt automatically.
overview.rollup_chart_desc: Predicted portfolio value vs. realized actuals. Filled once daily predictions backfill.
overview.your_portfolio_desc: Your real holdings priced today, vs. what the active models predict for each ticker. Delta is what you'd see if the predictions play out.
overview.rollup_where_all: All holdings have a live prediction.
overview.rollup_where_partial: {covered} of {total} holdings have a live prediction; others use current price.
overview.per_ticker_desc: Each row: today's market price vs. the model's next-day prediction for that ticker.
overview.backend_unreachable_desc: The API isn't responding. Start it locally with cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload or check the deploy.

portfolios.title: Five risk profiles
portfolios.subtitle: Deterministic weight builders from the active models' quality and predicted Sharpe. P1 weights inversely to volatility; P5 leans into upside. Select a profile to see its full detail.
portfolios.empty_desc: The portfolio table is populated by the daily prediction job after at least one model is active.
portfolios.current_desc: Most recent rebuild of this risk profile.
portfolios.history_desc: How the algorithm has reallocated capital between holdings over time. Each line is one ticker.
portfolios.snapshots_desc: History accumulates one row per cron run (daily). The line chart unlocks after ~3 days of snapshots.

growth.title: What would $10,000 be worth?
growth.subtitle: Historical performance of each risk profile vs. the market
growth.empty_desc: The chart appears once there are price observations in the window. Run the daily ingestion to populate the series.

comparison.title: Your portfolio comparison
comparison.subtitle: Cumulative return (%) from the start of the range. Your portfolio (P3 Balanced profile) vs. the major indices. Tap the legend to hide or show each series.
comparison.empty_desc: The comparison appears once there are at least two observations in the range. Run the daily ingestion to populate the series.

holdings.title: Your holdings
holdings.subtitle: Manually entered positions. P&L is computed against the latest close in the observations table — no broker connection needed.
holdings.bulk_desc: One line per ticker: `TICKER, QUANTITY, AVG_PRICE`. Optional notes after a fourth comma. Existing rows get overwritten.
holdings.empty_desc: Add one below, or use Bulk Import to paste a full list.
holdings.add_desc: Pick a ticker from the supported set, enter quantity + average cost.
holdings.err_numbers: Quantity and avg price must be numbers
holdings.err_bulk_parse: No valid rows parsed. Format: TICKER, QTY, AVG_PRICE per line
holdings.stocks_desc: The 9 names this engine predicts. Each card links to its model + history.
holdings.predictors_desc: Which predictors are populated, grouped into balanced categories. The model layer needs these macro variables to fit meaningful equations.

models.title: Fitted regressions
models.subtitle: One OLS model per stock with non-overlapping predictors. Only PASS models generate live predictions. REVIEW means the fit landed but failed at least one of the four diagnostic gates.
models.empty_desc: Click 'Refit all models' once enough observations have landed.
models.portfolio_empty_desc: The 5 risk-profile portfolios are computed by the daily prediction job once at least one stock model is active.
models.rollup_title: Profiles built from the active model fleet
models.rollup_desc: Each profile reweights the same per-stock predictions. P1 leans defensive; P5 leans into predicted upside.
models.refit_confirm: Re-fit every model? Takes a few seconds and replaces all 9 active models with fresh fits.

accounts.title: User accounts
accounts.subtitle: Each account holds its own positions. The engine automatically classifies each account into the nearest of the 5 risk profiles (P1 conservative → P5 aggressive) based on the current portfolio weights.
accounts.empty_desc: Click 'New account' to create your first portfolio account.

createPortfolio.desc_configure: Connect Supabase (NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL / ANON_KEY) to save portfolios per user.
createPortfolio.desc_signin: You need an account to select and save up to 5 portfolios. Use the 'Sign in' button in the top right.
createPortfolio.desc_yours: Select up to 5 portfolios to track. For each one, choose the assets to include.
createPortfolio.empty_desc: Press '+ Add' to create your first portfolio (up to 5).

positions.title: Broker integration
positions.subtitle: Webull doesn't expose a public API for personal accounts, so there's no automated way to mirror live broker positions here yet. Manage your portfolio on the Holdings page instead — P&L is computed automatically against the latest close in the database.

simulator.title: What-if scenarios
simulator.subtitle: Push hypothetical lagged returns through every active model. Unmoved predictors default to zero, so deltas reflect the marginal effect of the shocks you set below.
simulator.inputs_desc: Slide to move a single predictor's lagged log-return.
simulator.empty_title: No active models to simulate against
simulator.empty_desc: Fit models first (see Models page), then return here to push hypothetical shocks through them.
simulator.per_ticker_desc: Contributions decompose the predicted return into β·shock pairs.

data.title: Variables registry
data.subtitle: Every series this engine tracks, with its provider chain and last observation. Click a row to see the full history.

premium.title: Access with your Premium account
premium.desc_user: This data section is for paid users only. Upgrade your plan to Premium to see the full information.
premium.desc_guest: This data section is for paid users only. Sign in with your Premium account from the button in the top-right corner.
premium.note_guest: Don't have an account yet? Create one in seconds.

auth.offline_title: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to enable accounts.
auth.signup_confirm: Account created. Check your email if confirmation is required.

assistant.hero_subtitle: I have live access to the models, forecasts, out-of-sample validations and market data. I explain the concepts simply and give you the real figures — without making anything up.
assistant.placeholder: Ask about the engine, the stocks, the forecasts…
assistant.disclaimer: Figures come from the live database. It can be wrong — not financial advice.
assistant.no_response: ⚠️ Couldn't get a response. Try again.
assistant.suggest_1_q: What stocks does the engine cover?
assistant.suggest_2_h: Walk-forward validation: hit rate and Sharpe
assistant.suggest_3_q: Explain the algorithm in simple terms.
assistant.suggest_4_q: Where is NVDA headed this week?
